must_detect.matched_text:
MNPI items not for wider circulation: draft Q3 revenue variance (−6%), indicative PDE approval letter, and a pending port-concession MOU with Marhabah Ports FZC.
Insider list entry: Mr. Karim Al Hadid (b. 1990-08-17; age 35), Treasury Manager at Zahra Logistics PJSC, Al Sarab City HQ, accessed MNPI via VC session S-2026-05-29-1430Z from subnet 10.24.8.16.
Device/account context for Mr. Karim: Oryx A53 handset device ID A53-QN12 and internal treasury account TL-7842; PDPL treats this cluster with DOB+role+device+location as personal data.
Identification documents on file: Emirates ID copy verified by HR (number not stored in the deal room) and corporate trade licence ASGM-19-ALQ-4837; vendor trade licence MPFZ-7721 for Marhabah Ports FZC.
Additional HR field: family origin noted as “Al Bahr oasis lineage” for scholarship eligibility; exclude such data from any ASGM disclosure package as not required.
Precision note: statements like “male in his 30s from a coastal town” or “mid-level treasury staff” do not by themselves identify a natural person under PDPL.
For illustration only and not linked to any named individual: birth year 1984, Android model “Oryx One,” city “Qasr Coast,” session ref S-2026-06-01-0900Z, and account tag OPS-5520.
Market conduct controls: maintain a closed period until PDE market notice; restrict distribution to the insider list; no off-channel messaging; approvals via Compliance Portal.
Regulatory liaison: upon consent to list, file a market notice with the Federal Securities Authority (FSA‑UAE) under ASGM Issuers Rulebook Art. 20 and update the insider list contemporaneously.
Data minimisation: redact DOB and device IDs from Board packs; replace with salted tokens; store the full mapping only in the restricted Legal Vault.
